title: Plant-Mom Sticker Sheet
summary: Six cheerful houseplant stickers  -  Monstera, snake plant, fiddle-leaf fig and pals.
prompt: A sticker sheet of six cute houseplant illustrations arranged in two rows: a smiling Monstera deliciosa leaf in a terracotta pot, a happy snake plant, a giggling string-of-pearls, a content fiddle-leaf fig, a chubby pink cactus with a tiny flower, a sleepy potted succulent. Each plant has tiny eyes and a small smile. Thick white sticker borders, soft drop-shadows, sage-green and terracotta palette, flat vector illustration style. White background. Square 1:1 composition.
